title: World Protector
description: A simple Mod for Region Protection
body:
# World Protector

A lightweight, server-side region protection mod for Fabric `1.20.1` focused on fast setup, clear commands, and reliable enforcement.

## Features

- Cuboid region selection with a wand (`/wp wand`)
- Region creation, deletion, listing, and detailed inspection
- Per-region configurable protection flags
- Strong server-side event checks for block, interaction, PvP, and damage rules
- Persistent region storage across restarts
- Dimension-aware regions
- Admin bypass with dedicated test mode (`/wp test`)
- Selection preview particles while using the wand
- Straightforward command aliases for faster workflow

## Commands

- `/wp help`
- `/wp wand`
- `/wp create <name>`
- `/wp delete <name>`
- `/wp list`
- `/wp info <name>`
- `/wp <name>` (direct region info shortcut)
- `/wp where`
- `/wp flag <name> <flag|all> <true|false>`
- `/wp test`
- `/wp test cancel`

## Supported Flags

- `block_break`
- `block_place`
- `interact`
- `item_use`
- `entity_interact`
- `entity_damage`
- `pvp`
- `fall_damage`
- `fire_damage`
- `drowning_damage`
- `explosion_damage`
- `projectile_damage`
- `mob_damage`
- `starvation_damage`

Default behavior: all flags are `true` on new regions (everything allowed) until changed by an admin.

## Notes

- Designed for dedicated servers and clients.
- Uses Fabric API + Kotlin + Yarn mappings
- Works best with operator permission level `2+`
